description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rustlang/rust:nightly Docker image with a postgres:latest service and set POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, and POSTGRES_PASSWORD variables. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that exports CARGO_HOME to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/cargo, prepends its bin to PATH, then runs cargo build, and caches the target/ and cargo/ directories. In the test stage add a test job that exports CARGO_HOME and updates PATH, sets DATABASE_URL to postgres://lando@postgres/lando, installs libpq-dev, determines the latest diesel_cli version, installs or verifies diesel_cli via cargo install, runs diesel setup and diesel migration run, and finally executes cargo test. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs only on the master branch, exports PATH, switches rustup to nightly, runs diesel setup and migration, builds the release binary with cargo build --release, stops the lando service with supervisorctl, copies the binary and templates/static to /opt/lando, restarts the service, and targets the lando environment at https://lando.firechicken.net with an on_stop job stop_deploy that manually stops the service via supervisorctl.
